description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On April 12, 2023 at 5:29 PM PST a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Santa Monica, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Wilshire Boulevard at 26th Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwest on Wilshire Boulevard in the rightmost lane as it was approaching the intersection with 26th 
Street. The signal for traffic proceeding southwest on Wilshire Boulevard was red as the Waymo AV approached the intersection and came 
to a stop. The signal for traffic proceeding southwest on Wilshire Boulevard then turned green, and traffic in adjacent lanes began moving 
while the Waymo AV waited for traffic in its lane to begin to move. 
 
The SUV that had been stopped directly behind the Waymo AV began moving forward and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear 
of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was 
present (in the driver’s seating position). The Waymo sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
